generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong national defense. But have you seen how our allies are cutting back while expecting us to carry the burden? We can't afford to be caught off guard. A modest increase in defense spending isn't just about more weapons - it's about ensuring our first responders, cyber defenses, and disaster preparedness are ready for anything. Our families deserve that peace of mind. #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartInvestment
